name: OXXO Pay
description: OXXO Pay — Mexico cash payment method enabling customers to pay online orders at 20,000+ OXXO convenience stores nationwide.

seo.title: OXXO Pay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: OXXO Pay: OXXO Pay — Mexico cash payment method enabling customers to pay online orders at 20,000+ OXXO convenience stores nationwide.

when_to_use: Enabling cash payments for unbanked Mexican online shoppers
Converting OXXO payment codes for e-commerce order confirmation
Reducing cart abandonment for Mexico with cash payment option

pros: Cash-in-store fills gap left by cards
cons: Not a direct API, needs PSP bridge
review.verdict: Essential cash rail for Mexican e-commerce, but slow settlement and PSP dependency add friction.
review.best_for: E-commerce selling in Mexico to unbanked or cash-preferring shoppers
review.not_for: Merchants needing instant confirmation or non-Mexican coverage
